review_reason: Phase 3 blocked: F/P witness proofs require enriched dovetailing construction, not simple chain approach. 2 sorries remain (intFMCS_forward_F, intFMCS_backward_P). See plan Phase 3 blocker analysis for options.

partial_progress.details: Phases 1-2 complete (G/H coherence). Phase 3 blocked: F/P witness construction requires fundamentally different chain approach (enriched dovetailing). 2 sorries remain.

completion_data.completion_summary: Proved G/H temporal coherence for Int-indexed MCS chain. Built FMCS Int structure with forward_G and backward_H. F/P witness proofs blocked by architectural limitation: simple chain construction does not guarantee canonical witnesses land in chain range.

errors.message: F/P witness proofs require enriched dovetailing construction. Simple chain approach cannot guarantee canonical_forward_F witnesses are in chain range.
errors.recommendation: Option A: Implement enriched dovetailing chain (~4-6 hours additional work). Option B: Use CanonicalMCS-indexed BFMCS instead of Int-indexed (changes algebraic infrastructure requirements). Option C: Accept conditional theorem pending BFMCS construction.
